description_long: This object is a classic, long-barreled firearm with a dark metallic finish and a wooden grip. The barrel is cylindrical and extends significantly forward, with a visible front sight at the muzzle. The receiver and trigger assembly are robust, with a rounded trigger guard and a metallic lever beneath the receiver. The grip is made of polished wood, ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling, and the butt is slightly curved. The overall design is reminiscent of historical firearms, with a single, uninterrupted barrel and no visible magazine tube or pump mechanism. The object features a combination of metal and wood, giving it a traditional and durable appearance.
description: A long, dark metal shotgun with a polished wooden grip and a single, extended barrel. The design is classic and robust, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a curved wooden stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and front sight, with the barrel dominating the silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip, the trigger guard, and the hammer detail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the curved wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and grip contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with a front sight and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
